findings.detail: 双工系统 is a telecom duplex concept (full/half duplex). デュアルシステム means a dual-redundant fault-tolerant computing system. Correct ZH should be 双重系统 or 双机系统.
Same section 13-01 title rendered as 数据库的基础 on p450 but 数据库基础 on p451. Both are acceptable but uniformity required across sections.
Page 451 has stage6_verdict=WARN with leaf_count=26 (highest in chunk). polish_items_ref=polish_items.json#pages/451. Polish pass required before release.

findings.observed: 是指源代码公开、可以自由改良和再分发的软件。
findings.compare_p442: 源代码公开，可自由进行改良和再分发的软件。
findings.detail: Duplicate OSS term on p443 uses full-sentence ZH register (是指...) vs noun-phrase register on p442. Not a semantic error; minor stylistic inconsistency for same concept.

summary: 10 pages audited (95 leaves). Topic: OSS (p442-446) + file system path (p444/447) + backup/spreadsheet exercises (p445) + Database chapter intro (p449-451). 0 U+FFFD chars. 0 kana-in-ZH leaks. 2 MINOR issues: (F-01) 双工系统 is a wrong-concept rendering of デュアルシステム in ZH — telecom duplex vs fault-tolerant dual system; (F-02) section 13-01 ZH title inconsistent across p450/p451. 2 INFO items: (F-03) p451 stage6_verdict=WARN requires polish pass; (F-04) p443 OSS duplicate uses slightly different ZH sentence register from p442. No safety/security confusion, no duplicate markers, no sentence-as-term defects found.
